# MoedimAI

> MoedimAI turns African smallholder botanicals into verified, traceable, buyer-ready ingredients. Thirteen Kenyan-grown oils, every lot GC-MS or fatty acid profiled, traceable from farm to dispatch. Sold by the bottle and by the kilogram. Headquartered in Mount Kenya with EU operations in Rotterdam and US holding in Delaware.

## For buyers

- [Buyer supply desk](https://www.moedimai.com/buyers.md): MoedimAI for cosmetic, fragrance, and wellness buyers. Thirteen Kenyan botanicals available by the kilogram with full documentation.

## For investors and partners

- [Company thesis](https://www.moedimai.com/thesis.md): Chemotype-verification infrastructure for African organic exports. Three hundred farmers live, three thousand in pipeline, nine crops, 5 to 10 tonnes per day of processing capacity once the second distillation partner is online.

## For farmers

- [Jaribu by MoedimAI](https://www.moedimai.com/jaribu.md): Above-market prices for biomass, organic input support, and a path to certified export markets.

## About the company

- [About MoedimAI](https://www.moedimai.com/about.md): Kenyan production company with EU operations in Rotterdam and a US holding in Delaware. Founded and led by Vivian Nwakah.
- [Our approach](https://www.moedimai.com/approach.md): Five steps from smallholder plot to verified lot. ICS, processing, QC, and dispatch under EU 2018/848 and USDA NOP.
- [Team](https://www.moedimai.com/team.md): Vivian Nwakah and the Mount Kenya and Rotterdam team.
- [Press](https://www.moedimai.com/press.md): Press kit, fact sheet, logos, and media inquiries.

## Contact

vivian@moedimAI.com
